short_summary: Russian strikes continue; Iran deal dominates US attention
rationale: Russian strikes killing nine and damaging a historic cathedral are a direct continuation of the active war on Ukrainian territory; US diplomatic focus on Iran deal signing remains a concern for Western attention diversion.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine in Ukraine, damage historic cathedral
top_events.summary: Confirmed Russian bombardment killing civilians and destroying cultural heritage — direct ongoing threat to Ukrainian residents' lives and infrastructure, continuation of active war.

top_events.title: US-Iran peace deal signing expected Friday; deal announced
top_events.summary: US diplomatic energy concentrated on Iran deal finalisation — ongoing concern that Western attention and resources remain diverted from Ukraine's war needs.

top_events.title: Lebanese remain sceptical despite US-Iran ceasefire
top_events.summary: Regional doubts about Iran deal durability are noted — if deal collapses, US attention could shift further, but for now no direct change to Ukraine's situation.
